prob_desc_input_spec: The first contains three single positive integers a, b, c (1 ≤ a < b ≤ 105, 0 ≤ c ≤ 9).
prob_desc_notes: NoteThe fraction in the first example has the following decimal notation: . The first zero stands on second position.The fraction in the second example has the following decimal notation: . There is no digit 7 in decimal notation of the fraction.
prob_desc_output_spec: Print position of the first occurrence of digit c into the fraction. Positions are numbered from 1 after decimal point. It there is no such position, print -1.
prob_desc_description: You have a fraction . You need to find the first occurrence of digit c into decimal notation of the fraction after decimal point.
